title: Construct Binary Tree from Preorder and Inorder Traversal
hints: Identify the root from the first element of preorder and find its index in inorder to split left and right subtrees.
Use a hash map to store inorder indices for O(1) lookup, then recursively build the tree using index ranges.
After reconstruction, perform a breadth-first search, appending None for missing children, then strip trailing Nones.
